mapper.sql: b.id, b.park_id, p.name AS park_name, b.name, b.code, b.address, b.region, b.real_estate_no, b.property_no, b.land_no, b.sort_num, b.floors, b.area, b.property_area, b.rentable_area, b.self_use_area, b.supporting_area, b.parking_area, b.standard_floor_height, b.building_type, b.status, b.memo, b.create_by, b.create_time, b.update_by, b.update_time
